section.title: 6.1 Repository Structure
section.p: The system is organized into the following structure:
section.pre: repo-root в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ site в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ static portfolio output в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ api в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ serverless endpoint for query handling в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ scripts в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ ingestion and indexing pipeline в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ data в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ chunks.json в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ knowledge_graph.json в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ kb_index.faiss в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ docs в””в”Ђв”Ђ architecture and documentation files

section.title: 6.2 Ingestion and Indexing
section.p: The ingestion pipeline is executed using:
All generated artifacts are stored in the data directory.

section.title: 6.3 Runtime Environment

li.p: Loads the FAISS index into memory

section.p: The retrieval pipeline executes within a serverless API layer.

section.title: 6.4 Architecture Characteristics
section.p: The deployment model is designed to:
This approach is well-suited for portfolio-scale applications while maintaining production-quality retrieval behavior.
